privacy_note: Invalid timestamp schema classifier uses dry-run and evidence-link metadata only: paths, schema buckets, file types, counts, and source/manifest reference counts. It does not read or print memory bodies, JSON/JSONL bodies, raw QQ payloads, tokens, timestamp values, or secrets.
